pages.text: Yin-Yang Compass shows nearby yin qi as dots. High yin qi trends red, zero is white, and negative yin qi trends yellow. Most areas are near zero.

$(br)Yin qi does not place blocks. It is an invisible world field generated by noise. Zombies in non-zero yin qi areas gain resentment faster or slower: positive 3 means triple gain, negative 3 means one-third gain.

$(br)Qi injection uses V on any weapon with base attack damage. It costs 1% max qi and stores qi inside the weapon. Stored qi adds damage, but overfilling beyond base damage x100 drains durability each second until no longer overflowing.
$(br)Flying Sword is a sword weapon with netherite durability and 10 base damage. Press X to release it as a flying sword entity, then use Yuqi Shu to control it.

$(br)Crude Iron Small Ding is a rough beginner cauldron for Lianqi Early practice. It is heavy, uneven, and easy to fail.$(br2)Bronze Fire-Guiding Ding is a basic sect cauldron for early Lianqi, better than crude iron but still low success.
